tables: MPESB MP ITI Training Officer Recruitment 2026 Download Result for 1120 Post

Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) has released ITI Training Officer TO Notification 2026. Those candidates who are Enrolled in this MPESB ITI Training Officer Exam 2026 can Download Result. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, Practice Test, pay scale and all other information
Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) MPESB ITI Training Officer Recruitment 2026 MP ITI Training Officer TO 2026 : Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 17/01/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 31/01/2026 Last Date Pay Exam Fee : 31/01/2026 Form Correction Last Date : 05/02/2026 Exam Start : 27 February 2026 Admit Card Available : 20/02/2026 Answer Key Available : 18/03/2026 Result Available : 24/07/2026

Application Fee General / Other State : 560/- OBC / SC / ST : 310/- Portal Charges : 60/- (Include in this Fees) Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking , MP Kiosk
MPESB ITI Training Officer Notification 2025 : Age Limit as on 01/01/2027 Minimum Age : 18 Years Maximum Age : 40 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per MPESB ITI Training Officer Recruitment Rules 2026.
MPESB ITI Training Officer Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details Total : 1120 Post
Class 10th with ITI Certificate in Related Trade. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.

How to Fill MPESB ITI Training Officer Recruitment Online Form 2026 MPESB ITI Training Officer Recruitment for Various Post Candidate Can Apply Between 17/01/2026 to 31/01/2026 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in MPESB ITI Training Officer Recruitment 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
